hero.headline: Precision you can see.
hero.subheadline: Automotive, security and PPF window films with German engineering standards for demanding installers and dealerships.

brand.label: Our story
brand.title: German engineering, universal precision
brand.body: Kristall Film was born from an obsession with detail. Each film is the result of decades of research in precision optics and high-performance materials, applied today to the automotive and architectural industries.
brand.dark_body: Every product meets rigorous engineering specifications before reaching installation.
brand.cert1_body: Process control in every production batch

products.label: Products
products.klar_desc: High solar rejection with durable dye technology. Available in 5%, 20%, 35% and 50% transmission.
products.karbon_desc: Carbon nanoparticle technology for maximum solar rejection without signal interference.
products.keramx_desc: The best window film technology: high-performance nanoceramic with superior optical clarity.
products.krypton_desc: Nanoceramic technology with fragment retention on impact and intrusion resistance. Maximum protection for occupants and assets.
products.ppf_desc: Invisible automotive paint protection against impacts, scratches and chemical agents.
products.vitral_desc: Solar control for high-end commercial and residential glazing. Decorative and privacy options.

services.label: Services
services.svc1_desc: Professional film installation on dealership fleets. Standardized process, controlled timing and brand warranty.
services.svc2_desc: Digital platform for dealerships: order tracking, film inventory and installation reports.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your installation?
cta.subtitle: Contact our team and receive a custom proposal in 24 hours.

footer.tagline: German high-performance window film technology for installers and dealerships.

about.hero_body: Kristall Film is the result of decades of research in precision optical materials, applied today in the automotive and architectural industries worldwide.
about.timeline_1_body: The base technology was born in precision optics laboratories in Germany, focused on solar control in high-demand industrial glazing.
about.timeline_2_body: The multilayer formulation was adapted for automotive applications, achieving unprecedented infrared rejection levels in thin films.
about.timeline_3_body: Obtaining international quality certifications and first expansion into Latin American and Asia Pacific markets.
about.timeline_4_body: Launch of the Paint Protection Film line with thermal recovery polymer, extending the brand into the premium paint protection segment.
about.timeline_5_body: Dr Polarizados incorporates Kristall Film as a premium regional distribution brand, bringing German technology to the Argentine and Latin American market.
about.values_1_body: Every film is measured, tested and validated before leaving production. There is zero tolerance for defects.
about.values_2_body: The same production standard in every batch. What you install today is identical to what you installed last year.
about.values_3_body: We publish complete technical data sheets. Every specification is measurable and verifiable by the installer or end customer.
about.values_4_body: German-origin technology available today in Argentina and Latin America, with local support and regional response times.
about.values_5_body: Brand backing on every certified installation.
about.values_6_body: Reduction of thermal load in buildings and vehicles.
about.values_7_body: Specialized team for installers and distributors.
about.cert_2_body: North American standard for solar control films
about.cta_title: Want to work with Kristall Film?
about.cta_body: Add German technology to your business. Contact the team and receive a proposal within 24 hours.

services_page.hero_body: From professional installation at dealerships to operations management software. Kristall Film supports the entire process.
services_page.conc_body: We work directly with dealerships to offer a standardized window tinting service, with controlled timelines and Kristall Film brand warranty on every installation.
services_page.conc_f1_body: Certified installation protocol for the entire fleet
services_page.conc_f2_body: Guaranteed delivery according to agreed schedule
services_page.conc_f3_body: Brand backing on every installed vehicle
services_page.conc_f4_body: Team available for inquiries and follow-up
services_page.app_body: Operations management platform designed specifically for dealerships working with window film. Order control, inventory and real-time reports.
services_page.app_f1_body: Complete management of each installation cycle
services_page.app_f3_body: Dashboard with productivity and sales KPIs
services_page.app_f4_body: Complete record by vehicle and customer
services_page.final_body: Contact our team and receive a personalized proposal for your operation. We respond in less than 48 hours.
